executives.name: Charlie Kawwas, Ph.
executives.background: Dr. Kawwas has served as President, Semiconductor Solutions Group since July 2022. He previously served as Chief Operating Officer from December 2020 to July 2022 and as Senior Vice President, Sales from May 2014 to December 2020.

executives.name: Kirsten Spears
executives.background: Ms. Spears has served as Chief Financial Officer and Chief Accounting Officer since December 2020. She previously served as Vice President and Corporate Controller from May 2014 to December 2020. Prior to joining Broadcom, she was Vice President and Corporate Controller at LSI Corporation.

executives.name: Abhi Talwalkar
executives.background: Former President and CEO of LSI Corporation. Director since 2017.
